docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VILLATORO, JOSE NELSON RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MALIK, AMJAD MALIK, ALIA $6,095.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,095.00, BASED ON THE TESTIMONY AND PHYSICAL EVIDENCE PROVIDED, THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANT STRUCK PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE AND CAUSED THE RESULTANT INJURIES FOR WHICH MEDICAL CARE WAS SOUGHT. THE COURT THEREFORE AWARDS THOSE COSTS. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF FOR ADDITIONAL DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-25-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MALIK, ALIA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2025 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LAURA KRAMER SUJEETH. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF JOSE NELSON VILLATORO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AMJAD MALIK ET AL IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY VILLATORO, JOSE NELSON AS TO DEFENDANT MALIK, AMJAD MALIK, ALIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-10-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON DEC 22, 2025. SMALL CLAIMS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO AMJAD MALIK RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MALIK, AMJAD MALIK, ALIA
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED OCT-29-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $75.00 AS TO DEFENDANT MALIK, AMJAD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-10-2025 - JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION TO USE A JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY VILLATORO, JOSE NELSON MALIK, AMJAD
